title: MCP Architecture, Negotiation, and Trust Boundaries · Design Defense
summary: Trace one tool call across host, client, server, and external system. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for an MCP architecture and threat-boundary diagram. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish host, per-server client, server, model, user, and external service responsibilities.
Trace initialization, capability negotiation, requests, responses, notifications, and errors.
Advertise and negotiate only implemented protocol capabilities.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure
steps.instruction:
Use a changed quiz case derived from this module: agent ext mcp architecture. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Use a changed quiz case derived from this module: agent ext mcp architecture. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for target a named stable specification and isolate release-candidate changes.

content.text: Target a named stable specification and isolate release-candidate changes. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Preserve authority, safety, accessibility, traceability, and stakeholder consequences alongside technical correctness.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: agent ext mcp architecture. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Spec Versioning, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to an MCP architecture and threat-boundary diagram.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: The newest announced release candidate is already the stable protocol. This fails the Spec Versioning contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.value: OpenAI Codex Manual: Build Skills (Verified current 2026-07-13) — Controls Codex skill structure, progressive disclosure, locations, invocation, plugins, and dependencies.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Target a named stable specification and isolate release-candidate changes.

stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: required

options.text: Accept the result because visible output is the highest authority.

Run the boundary case, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Spec Versioning applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Target a named stable specification and isolate release-candidate changes.

hints: Name the Spec Versioning precondition or invariant that the quiz case must preserve.
Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed quiz case derived from this module: agent ext mcp architecture. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
